title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CAMP MURPHY TO CAMP GENERAL EMILIO AGUINALDO

chunks.text:
H. No. 7985 / 62 OG No. 39, 6993 (September 26, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4434, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CAMP MURPHY TO CAMP GENERAL EMILIO AGUINALDO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Camp Murphy shall hereafter be known and referred to as Camp General Emilio Aguinaldo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
